tldr_zh: OpenAI拓展家庭市場，Meta移除爭議AI功能，Bluesky確立新CEO，科技政策與安全問題持續升溫。
tldr_en: OpenAI targets families, Meta removes controversial AI feature, Bluesky appoints permanent CEO, tech policy and security issues intensify.

items.title_zh: OpenAI招聘家庭產品經理，ChatGPT深入家戶生活
items.title_en: OpenAI hires dedicated product manager to build ChatGPT experiences for families
items.summary_zh: OpenAI正在招聘專責產品經理，針對家庭、照護者和老年人開發ChatGPT體驗。此舉標誌著OpenAI將重點擴展到消費者家庭領域，進一步深化AI助手在日常生活中的應用，涵蓋教育、健康照護等多個場景。
items.summary_en: OpenAI is hiring a dedicated product manager to build ChatGPT experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults. This marks OpenAI's expansion into household markets, deepening AI integration into daily family life across education, health, and caregiving scenarios.

items.title_zh: Meta移除爭議性AI功能，回應用戶反彈
items.title_en: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
items.summary_zh: Meta宣布移除Instagram上一項引發爭議的AI創意工具，該功能允許AI參考用戶公開內容進行創作。Meta承認該功能未能達到預期效果，已停止提供。這反映出科技巨頭在AI應用中需要更謹慎地平衡創新與用戶隱私。
items.summary_en: Meta has removed a controversial AI creative tool from Instagram that allowed AI to reference users' public content. The company acknowledged the feature missed the mark after receiving significant user feedback, highlighting the need for tech giants to balance AI innovation with privacy concerns.

items.title_zh: Bluesky確立新CEO，前Automattic領導人Toni Schneider正式上任
items.title_en: Bluesky appoints Toni Schneider as permanent CEO
items.summary_zh: 前Automattic和True Ventures的高管Toni Schneider正式成為Bluesky的CEO，不再是臨時職位。他表示將「全力投入」這個非傳統社交媒體平台的發展。此舉為Bluesky這個試圖與X競爭的平台帶來穩定的領導。
items.summary_en: Toni Schneider, formerly CEO of Automattic and partner at True Ventures, becomes permanent CEO of Bluesky. He commits to being "all in" on the unconventional social media platform, providing stable leadership as it competes with X.

items.title_zh: U-Boot開機程式爆出6個資安漏洞，數百萬設備面臨威脅
items.title_en: Security researcher reveals 6 vulnerabilities in open-source U-Boot bootloader
items.summary_zh: Binarly資安研究機構揭露開源開機程式U-Boot存在6個漏洞，其中2個可能導致任意程式碼執行。這些漏洞影響廣泛的伺服器、網路設備和物聯網設備，構成重大安全威脅。
items.summary_en: Security firm Binarly has disclosed 6 vulnerabilities in open-source bootloader U-Boot, with 2 potentially enabling arbitrary code execution. The flaws affect millions of servers, network devices, and IoT devices, posing significant security risks.

items.title_zh: 微軟發布AI視覺化中介語言Flint，簡化圖表生成
items.title_en: Microsoft launches Flint, an AI visualization intermediate language
items.summary_zh: 微軟研究院發布開源視覺化中介語言Flint，讓AI代理以可修改的規格描述圖表，編譯器自動補齊細節。Flint支援轉換為Vega-Lite、ECharts等格式，降低AI直接生成圖表時的錯誤率和維護難度。
items.summary_en: Microsoft released open-source visualization language Flint, enabling AI agents to describe charts in human-readable specs that compilers automatically complete. It supports conversion to Vega-Lite, ECharts, and Chart.js, reducing errors and maintenance challenges in AI-generated visualizations.

items.title_zh: 美國CISA發現事件應變計畫在事件中臨時制定
items.title_en: US cybersecurity agency CISA built incident response playbook during the incident
items.summary_zh: 美國國土安全部網路安全與基礎設施安全局(CISA)承認，在應對GitHub員工洩露密碼事件時，是在事件發生中臨時建立事件應變計畫。此事暴露了關鍵基礎設施保護機構本身的應變準備不足問題。
items.summary_en: US cybersecurity agency CISA revealed it had to build its incident response playbook during a security incident involving exposed passwords on GitHub. The revelation exposes gaps in the critical infrastructure protection agency's own incident response preparedness.

items.title_zh: Phia被控「Cookie Stuffing」詐騙，冒領未賺得的銷售佣金
items.title_en: Bill Gates' daughter's startup Phia accused of cookie stuffing affiliate fraud
items.summary_zh: 比爾蓋茲女兒Phoebe創辦的購物新創Phia遭指控使用「Cookie Stuffing」詐騙手法，冒領自身未產生的銷售佣金。此做法通過在網頁植入追蹤代碼虛假獲得聯盟行銷信用。
items.summary_en: Shopping startup Phia, founded by Bill Gates' daughter Phoebe, is accused of cookie stuffing—falsely claiming affiliate credit for purchases it didn't generate. The practice involves implanting tracking codes to fraudulently earn marketing commissions.

items.title_zh: 西班牙野火災情嚴重，至少12人喪生數百消防員奮力撲滅
items.title_en: Spain battles one of its deadliest wildfires with at least 12 killed
items.summary_zh: 西班牙南部發生嚴重野火災情，至少造成12人死亡，另有23人失蹤。數百名消防員正全力撲救。據報多名英國人在受害者中，火勢仍未完全控制。
items.summary_en: Spain is battling one of its deadliest wildfires in the south, killing at least 12 people with 23 more missing. Hundreds of firefighters are battling the blaze, with several British nationals reported among the victims.

items.title_zh: 中國浙江連遭兩場颱風襲擊，近200萬人緊急撤離
items.title_en: China's Zhejiang province hit by second typhoon in a week, nearly 2 million evacuated
items.summary_zh: 中國浙江省在一週內遭受第二場颱風襲擊。溫州等地靠近颱風路徑，當地已撤離近200萬人。連續颱風威脅該地區基礎設施和居民安全。
items.summary_en: Eastern China's Zhejiang province is hit by its second typhoon in a week. Nearly 2 million people have been evacuated from the region, with the city of Wenzhou close to the storm's path, facing threats to infrastructure and residents' safety.

items.title_zh: 美國與伊朗在荷莫茲海峽局勢升級，雙方進行高層調解
items.title_en: US launches fresh strikes as tensions escalate in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary_zh: 伊朗關閉荷莫茲海峽後，美國發動新一輪打擊。伊朗外交部長赴阿曼與官員討論通道安全事宜，美國則要求伊朗公開承諾海峽航行自由與安全。國際調解方正安排高層協商以化解危機。
items.summary_en: Tensions escalate in the Strait of Hormuz as the US launches fresh strikes following an Iranian attack on a Cyprus-flagged vessel. Iran's foreign minister visits Oman to discuss maritime safety arrangements, while the US seeks Iranian commitment to freedom of navigation.

items.title_zh: 越南南部快艇傾覆，15名印度遊客喪生
items.title_en: 15 Indian tourists killed as speedboat capsizes off Vietnam
items.summary_zh: 越南南部富國島外發生快艇傾覆事故，載有32名印度遊客和4名船員的船隻沉沒，造成15人死亡。事故原因仍在調查中。
items.summary_en: A speedboat carrying 32 Indian tourists and 4 crew members capsized off Phu Quoc island in southern Vietnam, killing 15 Indian tourists. The vessel sank near Hon May Rut Ngoai Island, with rescue and investigation efforts ongoing.
